---
name: Security Risk
about: Track a bot, CRM, dependency, workflow, data, or automation security risk
title: "Security Risk: "
labels: security, quality
assignees: ""
---

## Risk summary

Describe the risk without posting secrets, credentials, private lead/customer data, or exploit details.

## Affected area

- [ ] Bot workflow
- [ ] Bot prompt/script
- [ ] CRM / lead data
- [ ] Website copy/form
- [ ] GitHub Actions workflow
- [ ] Dependency/package
- [ ] API key / secret
- [ ] Affiliate/tool recommendation
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Other:

## Risk level

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

## Category

- [ ] Workflow configuration
- [ ] Permissions
- [ ] Dependency
- [ ] Language detection
- [ ] True vulnerability
- [ ] Quality/compliance

## Why it matters


## Immediate containment

- [ ] Remove exposed data
- [ ] Rotate secrets
- [ ] Disable risky workflow or bot flow
- [ ] Patch dependency
- [ ] Restrict access
- [ ] Review logs
- [ ] Other:

## Fix plan


## Prevention checklist

- [ ] Update bot prompt/workflow
- [ ] Add human handoff
- [ ] Update data classification
- [ ] Add automation/check
- [ ] Update documentation
- [ ] Update quality gate

## Follow-up

- [ ] Fix completed
- [ ] Secrets rotated if needed
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] Prevention added
- [ ] Performance/security log updated
